summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Acuitas Small Cap Active ETF (AIMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital appreciation with reduced volatility through exposure to US small-cap companies. Stock selection uses a multi-manager approach. AIMS was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by Acuitas.

data.title: Acuitas Investments Brings Its Institutional Acumen for Small and Microcap Investing to the ETF Universe With the Launch of the Acuitas Small Cap Active ETF (AIMS)
data.text: SEATTLE, Feb. 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Acuitas Investments, one of the most experienced teams in providing small and microcap products for institutional investors, is today launching its first Exc...

news.t: Acuitas Investments Brings Its Institutional Acumen for Small and Microcap Investing to the ETF Universe With the Launch of the Acuitas Small Cap Active ETF (AIMS)

holdings.infoBox: AIMS is an equity ETF with a total of 280 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund stock at 1.90%, PDF Solutions at 1.67%, Ligand Pharmaceuticals at 1.58%, Covenant Logistics Group at 1.49%, and Triumph Financial at 1.32%.
